title: narcissus assoanus subsp. assoanus
intro: Narcissus assoanus subsp. assoanus, a species of the Narcissus genus, is a bulbous perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region, known for its white or yellow flowers with a strong, sweet fragrance. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Narcissus assoanus subsp. assoanus include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and act as an expectorant, making it effective in treating respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. The herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
